reviews.review_description:
The game worked good one time.  After that all my cleared levels disappeared and nothing shows up anymore to lift.  
I’ve written the company 5 times and no response or solutions.

reviews.review_title: I'm a little pissed yet still impressed
reviews.review_description: Ok. So I understand that this is early access and all but I'm doing the training and which is like the first thing😮‍💨. But!!! I can't lower the cable beyond a certain point 😮. It just stops. And I can't continue.  Now the graphics is ok but I downloaded a crane simulator on my Samsung Galaxy with way better graphics and it costed nothing 😨.. with the cost of the vr and the capabilities of the vr, why are we even here😕
I looked hard and long to find this cool game. It worked until I reached level 10. I want to know why it doesn’t work anymore. There isn’t a slot for coins. Please please get it back up and working.

Upon initial installation, it worked great and was fun. Since the first time I played it, I can’t get the app to work right . It won’t do anything except training mode, which is  nothing more than the view…nothing to move or train on. I have tried restarting, uninstalling and redownloading but nothing has worked.  If it would work, it would be awesome.

First of all, it does not feel like a tower crane cabin. I am a tower crane instructor and the worst thing is that the right lever is opposite. Down from you and up towards you. Also no tower cranes has balls on stics to drive it and it is impossible to hold the levers. This game has potential, but it needs a lot of work. I hope it gets upgraded and that the developers takes a few trips up to real tower cranes. Not worth the money yet unfortunately, but I hope to make a new review soon!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! Its still in development phase you will see the improvement soon. If you have more things to share, please do at Info@tulipapps.com. Have a Nice Day
